title.fr: Le développement de la vie en mer: une visualisation statistique plus facile
title.es: Seaborn: se facilita la visualización estadística
title.ko: 해양생: 통계적 시각화 가 용이 한 것

description.en: Use seaborn to create beautiful statistical charts — distributions, relationships, and categorical plots — with minimal code.

story_variants.en:
## Seaborn: Statistics Meets Beauty

**Seaborn** is built on top of Matplotlib and makes statistical visualisation dramatically easier. It understands pandas DataFrames natively and produces publication-quality charts with very little code.

### Why Seaborn?

| Feature | Matplotlib | Seaborn |
|---------|------------|----------|
| Works with DataFrames | Manual | Native |
| Default styling | Basic | Beautiful |
| Statistical plots | Manual | Built-in |
| Complexity | High | Low |

### Distribution Plots

```python
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Histogram + KDE curve
sns.histplot(data=df, x='age', kde=True, bins=20)

# Kernel Density Estimate only
sns.kdeplot(data=df, x='score', hue='dept', fill=True)

plt.show()
```

### Relationship Plots

```python
# Scatter with regression line
sns.regplot(data=df, x='study_hours', y='score')

# Scatter coloured by category
sns.scatterplot(data=df, x='age', y='income', hue='education')

# Correlation heatmap
import numpy as np
corr = df.corr(numeric_only=True)
sns.heatmap(corr, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt='.2f')
```

### Categorical Plots

```python
# Box plot — distribution per category
sns.boxplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary')

# Violin plot — richer distribution shape
sns.violinplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary')

# Bar chart with confidence intervals
sns.barplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary', estimator='mean')
```

### The FacetGrid — Multiple Plots by Category

```python
g = sns.FacetGrid(df, col='dept', height=4)
g.map(sns.histplot, 'salary')
g.add_legend()
```

> **Key Insight:** Seaborn's `hue`, `col`, and `row` parameters let you split a single plot by a categorical variable. This makes comparing groups effortless — no manual looping needed.
story_variants.ta:
## Seaborn: சாண்டிஸ்டிக்ஸ் மற்றும் அழகு

**Seaborn** என்பது Matplotlib-ன் மீது கட்டமைக்கப்பட்டுள்ளது மற்றும் புள்ளியியல் காட்சிப்படுத்தலை மிகவும் எளிதாக்குகிறது. இது pandas DataFrames-களை இயல்புநிலையாக புரிந்துகொள்கிறது மற்றும் மிகக் குறைந்த குறியீட்டுடன் வெளியேற்றத்திற்குத் தகுதியான அளவுகோல் தரமான வரைபடங்களை உருவாக்குகிறது.

### ஏன் Seaborn?

| அம்சம் | Matplotlib | Seaborn |
|---------|------------|----------|
| DataFrames-களுடன் வேலை செய்கிறது | கைமுறை | இயல்புநிலை |
| இயல்புநிலை நடைமுறை | அடிப்படை | அழகான |
| புள்ளியியல் வரைபடங்கள் | கைமுறை | உள்ளமைக்கப்பட்ட |
| சிக்கல்தன்மம் | உயர் | குறைவு |

### விநியோக வரைபடங்கள்```python
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Histogram + KDE curve
sns.histplot(data=df, x='age', kde=True, bins=20)

# Kernel Density Estimate only
sns.kdeplot(data=df, x='score', hue='dept', fill=True)

plt.show()
```### உறவு வரைபடங்கள்```python
# Scatter with regression line
sns.regplot(data=df, x='study_hours', y='score')

# Scatter coloured by category
sns.scatterplot(data=df, x='age', y='income', hue='education')

# Correlation heatmap
import numpy as np
corr = df.corr(numeric_only=True)
sns.heatmap(corr, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt='.2f')
```### வகைப்படுத்தப்பட்ட வரைபடங்கள்```python
# Box plot — distribution per category
sns.boxplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary')

# Violin plot — richer distribution shape
sns.violinplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary')

# Bar chart with confidence intervals
sns.barplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary', estimator='mean')
```### FacetGrid — ஒவ்வொரு வகைக்குமான பல வரைபடங்கள்```python
g = sns.FacetGrid(df, col='dept', height=4)
g.map(sns.histplot, 'salary')
g.add_legend()
```> **முக்கிய உணர்வு:** Seaborn இன் `hue`, `col`, மற்றும் `row` அளவுருக்கள் ஒரே வரைபடத்தை ஒரு வகைப்படுத்தப்பட்ட மாறியால் பிரிக்க உதவுகின்றன. இது குழுக்களை ஒப்பிடுவதை எளிதாக்குகிறது — கைமுறை வட்டமிடல் தேவையில்லை.
story_variants.te:
## సముద్రపు పుట్టినవారుః అందం తో గణాంకాలు

** సీబోర్న్** Matplotlib పైన నిర్మించబడింది మరియు గణాంక దృశ్యమానతను నాటకీయంగా సులభతరం చేస్తుంది. ఇది పాండా డేటాఫ్రేమ్లను స్థానికంగా అర్థం చేసుకుంటుంది మరియు చాలా తక్కువ కోడ్తో ప్రచురణ-నాణ్యత చార్ట్లను ఉత్పత్తి చేస్తుంది.

### సీబర్న్ ఎందుకు?

 ఫీచర్  మ్యాపుల్ లిబ్  సీబర్న్ 
|---------|------------|----------|
 డేటా ఫ్రేమ్లతో పనిచేస్తుంది  మాన్యువల్  స్థానిక 
 డిఫాల్ట్ స్టైలింగ్ ప్రాథమిక  అందమైన 
 గణాంక పటాలు  అంతర్నిర్మిత మాన్యువల్ 
 సంక్లిష్టత  అధికం  తక్కువం 

### పంపిణీ ప్లాట్లు

```python
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Histogram + KDE curve
sns.histplot(data=df, x='age', kde=True, bins=20)

# Kernel Density Estimate only
sns.kdeplot(data=df, x='score', hue='dept', fill=True)

plt.show()
```

### సంబంధాలు

```python
# Scatter with regression line
sns.regplot(data=df, x='study_hours', y='score')

# Scatter coloured by category
sns.scatterplot(data=df, x='age', y='income', hue='education')

# Correlation heatmap
import numpy as np
corr = df.corr(numeric_only=True)
sns.heatmap(corr, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', fmt='.2f')
```

### వర్గీకరణ పటాలు

```python
# Box plot — distribution per category
sns.boxplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary')

# Violin plot — richer distribution shape
sns.violinplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary')

# Bar chart with confidence intervals
sns.barplot(data=df, x='dept', y='salary', estimator='mean')
```

### ఫేస్ గ్రిడ్  వర్గాల ప్రకారం బహుళ ప్లాట్లు

```python
g = sns.FacetGrid(df, col='dept', height=4)
g.map(sns.histplot, 'salary')
g.add_legend()
```

> ** కీ ఇన్సైట్ః** సీబోర్న్ యొక్క `hue`, `col`, మరియు `row` పారామితులు ఒకే ప్లాట్ను కేటగిరీ వేరియబుల్ ద్వారా విభజించడానికి మిమ్మల్ని అనుమతిస్తాయి. ఇది సమూహాలను పోల్చడం కష్టతరం చేస్తుంది  ఎటువంటి మాన్యువల్ లూపింగ్ అవసరం లేదు.

explanation.en: Import seaborn — conventionally aliased as sns
Histogram with an optional KDE curve overlay — one line of code!
Correlation heatmap — colour intensity shows strength of relationship

left.label: Matplotlib histogram
left.code:
fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.hist(df['age'], bins=20)
ax.set_xlabel('age')
ax.set_ylabel('count')

animation_sequence.code:
import seaborn as sns
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

np.random.seed(42)
df = pd.DataFrame({
    'x': np.random.randn(100),
    'y': np.random.randn(100),
    'category': np.random.choice(['A', 'B'], 100)
})

sns.set_theme(style='whitegrid')
sns.scatterplot(data=df, x='x', y='y', hue='category')
sns.histplot(data=df, x='x', kde=True, hue='category')
sns.heatmap(df[['x','y']].corr(), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm')

executionSteps.explanation: Create sample DataFrame with x, y, and category
Set clean white background with grid lines
Scatter colored by category — automatic legend
Distribution with smooth kernel density estimate overlay

instruction.en: Create a DataFrame `iris_df` with columns `sepal_length`, `sepal_width`, and `species` (at least 3 species with several rows each). Plot a seaborn boxplot comparing `sepal_length` across species.
instruction.ta: `iris_df` என்ற DataFrame உருவாக்கவும், `sepal_length`, `sepal_width`, மற்றும் `species` ஆகிய நெடுவரிசைகளுடன் (ஒவ்வொரு இனத்திற்கும் பல வரிசைகள் கொண்டு). `species` மீது `sepal_length` ஐ ஒப்பிட `seaborn` boxplot வரையவும்.
instruction.te: `sepal_length`, `sepal_width`, మరియు `sepal_width`(కనీసం 3 రకాలు ప్రతి అనేక వరుసలు) కాలమ్లతో ఒక డేటాఫ్రేమ్`iris_df` సృష్టించండి.
instruction.ml: `sepal_length`, `sepal_width`, `sepal_width`, `sepal_width`, `species`എന്നീ നിരകളുള്ള ഒരു ഡാറ്റാഫ്രെയിം`iris_df`സൃഷ്ടിക്കുക (ഓരോ വരിയിലും കുറഞ്ഞത് 3 ഇനം) ഇനം തമ്മിലുള്ള`sepal_length` താരതമ്യം ചെയ്യുന്ന ഒരു കടൽത്തീര ബോക്സ് പ്ലോട്ട് പ്ലോട്ട് ചെയ്യുക.
instruction.fr: Créer un DataFrame `iris_df`avec les colonnes`sepal_length`, `sepal_width`, et `species` (au moins 3 espèces avec plusieurs rangées chacune).
instruction.es: Crear un DataFrame `iris_df`con columnas`sepal_length`, `sepal_width`, y `species` (al menos 3 especies con varias filas cada una).
instruction.it: Crea un DataFrame `iris_df`con colonne`sepal_length`, `sepal_width`, e `species` (almeno 3 specie con diverse righe ciascuna).
instruction.ko: `sepal_length`, `sepal_width`, 그리고 `sepal_width`(당당 몇 줄이 있는 최소 3종) 기둥으로 데이터프레임`iris_df`를 생성하십시오.

hints.en: You can use sns.load_dataset('iris') if available

practice_challenges.test_code:
import pandas as pd
assert isinstance(iris_df, pd.DataFrame)
assert 'sepal_length' in iris_df.columns
assert 'species' in iris_df.columns
assert iris_df['species'].nunique() >= 2, 'Need at least 2 species'

instruction.en: Using the same `iris_df`, create a scatter plot with `sepal_length` on x, `sepal_width` on y, and `species` as the `hue`. Store the axes object in `ax`.

practice_challenges.test_code:
import matplotlib
assert ax is not None, 'ax must be assigned'
assert hasattr(ax, 'get_xlabel'), 'ax must be a matplotlib Axes'
